'''kangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pachyostotically|pachyostotically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pachyostotically|pachyostotically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kangate|kangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kangatesher|kangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangatesherĂ«m|kangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kangatero|kangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kangateshĂ«|kangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangateshĂ«m|kangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikangatero|gokikangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikangateshĂ«|gokikangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangateshĂ«m|gokikangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokangankerom|gokangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokangankeshĂ«|gokangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangankeshĂ«m|gokangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokangankeya|gokangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kangaterom|kangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangatemu|kangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kangateya|kangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikangaterom|gokikangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangatemu|gokikangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikangateya|gokikangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kangangate|kangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kangangatesher|kangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangangatesherĂ«m|kangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kangangatero|kangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kangangateshĂ«|kangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangangateshĂ«m|kangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikangangatero|gokikangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikangangateshĂ«|gokikangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangangateshĂ«m|gokikangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokangangankerom|gokangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokangangankeshĂ«|gokangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangangankeshĂ«m|gokangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokangangankeya|gokangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kangangaterom|kangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangangatemu|kangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kangangateya|kangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikangangaterom|gokikangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangangatemu|gokikangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikangangateya|gokikangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠte|kĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠtesher|kĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠtero|kĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠngĂŠtero|gokikĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠterom|kĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠtemu|kĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠngĂŠteya|kĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠngĂŠterom|gokikĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠngĂŠteya|gokikĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafngafte|kafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafngaftesher|kafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafngaftesherĂ«m|kafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafngaftero|kafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafngafteshĂ«|kafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafngafteshĂ«m|kafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafngaftero|gokikafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafngafteshĂ«|gokikafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafngafteshĂ«m|gokikafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafngafnkerom|gokafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafngafnkeshĂ«|gokafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafngafnkeshĂ«m|gokafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafngafnkeya|gokafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafngafterom|kafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafngaftemu|kafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafngafteya|kafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafngafterom|gokikafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafngaftemu|gokikafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafngafteya|gokikafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
